---
title: "Bladimir | Publications"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa-by-year.csl
nocite: |
  @padilla2026multilevel, @padilla2025socioeconomic, @padilla2023evaluacion, @padilla2023seguimiento
---

I began working in research in 2015, during my third year of the Social Work program at the Universidad del Bío-Bío. My first position was as a research assistant at the Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE, after being invited by Professor Carlos Rodríguez Garcés — my supervisor, mentor, and dear friend.

Since then, I have worked on many projects, particularly those related to education, although I have also enjoyed studying topics related to public safety and the philosophy of Michel Foucault — a more personal intellectual passion that I have not yet published on.

In this section, you will find a selection of my publications, including journal articles, book chapters, and my master's thesis. For a complete list and full-text access, visit my <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Bladimir-Padilla-2" target="_blank">ResearchGate profile</a>.

::: {.section-title}
Selected Publications
:::

::: {#refs}
:::

::: {.section-title}
Thesis
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Master's Thesis
**Padilla, B.** (2025). *Conflated Random Slopes in Multilevel Analysis*. University of Iowa.

<a href="padilla2025-maThesis.pdf" target="_blank">⬇ Download full document (PDF)</a>
:::

<a href="#top" class="back-to-top">↑ Back to top</a>
